title: ActionProposal
description: A single action proposed by the agent during a run.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this action proposal.

run_id.description: The run this proposal belongs to.

tool_name.description: The tool the agent proposed to invoke.

target.description: The resource or endpoint the action targets.

payload.description: Parameters or data the action would send.

proposed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the proposal was generated.

reason.description: The agent's stated reason for proposing this action.
